creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
ezjail-admin cleans ezjail_ftphost when it is run with the install
target, but it says in the documenation:

    Default host to fetch packages from is ftp.freebsd.org, you may
    want to change this via the -h option or in ezjail.conf(5).


[/usr/jails] root@webtree>grep ezjail_ftphost /usr/local/etc/ezjail.conf
ezjail_ftphost=ftp3.au.freebsd.org
[/usr/jails] root@webtree>ezjail-admin install
Trying 2001:6c8:6:4::7...
ftp: connect to address 2001:6c8:6:4::7: No route to host
Trying 2001:4f8:0:2::e...
ftp: connect to address 2001:4f8:0:2::e: No route to host
Trying 204.152.184.73...
Connected to ftp.freebsd.org.
220 Welcome to freebsd.isc.org.
331 Please specify the password.
